steps.description: Click the "Extensions" icon in the left sidebar of the Visual Studio Code interface to open the Extensions panel.
Type text 'm365 agents toolkit' into the search input field in the Extensions: Marketplace panel of Visual Studio Code.
Click the "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" extension entry in the Visual Studio Code Extensions Marketplace sidebar, directly below the search bar after searching for "m365 agents toolkit".

Click the "DETAILS" tab in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension page within the Visual Studio Code Extensions Marketplace panel. The red crosshair highlights the tab, making this step precise for navigating to the extension's detailed information section.
@assertion "What is Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit" exists in the Details tab.
@assertion the images inside the Details tab displays normally

Click the hyperlink labeled "an evolution of Teams Toolkit" in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit extension details pane within the Visual Studio Code Extensions Marketplace interface. The red crosshair marks the exact position of the link, confirming precise interaction with the highlighted anchor text.
@assertion "Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit is a suite of tools" exists
